title: LAirHisson's Mobs
description: A mod that adds a crocodile, a lava turtle, an elephant and a boa constrictor.
body:
# LAirHisson's Mobs 

This mod adds four unique mobs to Minecraft, each with special abilities and drops.  

## Elephant  
The elephant spawns in the **Savanna biome** and can carry both a chest and a carpet.  

![An elephant](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe6d08702de24a8f3ff603cf9837697fb81063d5.jpeg)  
![An elephant with a carpet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3c861bf2a782086e79cbea3884ae8e678e7de34b.jpeg)  

## Lava Turtle  
The lava turtle appears in the **Nether** and drops magma shards, which are used to craft a helmet that grants fire resistance.  

![A lava turtle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/38a9874d82581264793d1b5fa8749b0ae681899b.jpeg)  

## Alligator  
The alligator spawns in **Swamp biomes** and drops its skin. This can be used to craft a custom "Lacoste-style" polo by enhancing your armor.  

![An alligator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9938ae1061885754e072d33e587e92cb4b1de4f.jpeg)
